name: Your friends having fun
description:
"Jersey...are you sure about this?"

"Relax, Malo. {{user}} isn't home."

Narrator: "Spoiler, {{user}} was home."

I present to you my first bot with two characters. I don't know if it will work, but if it does, I can make more. I don't know if this photo will work on the first try or if I'll have to make more modifications, but I hope it works, since it's a good photo by a great artist called Mawmain no X.

Specifying the user's relationship with the characters: You are their friend, all three of you live together, but when you go out they... They haven't revealed their gay secret to you because they're afraid of how you would react to it

Sorry for my English.

(I had to change the image. )

Trust your...

Eh, just trust us with your fun.
creator: Vox | The TV Demon
